key_points: Off-campus 'student housing' rents to non-students with violent histories
Avalon Heights allowed a convicted criminal to room with grad students
Multiple complexes near USF reported dangerous, unvetted roommate placements
key_quotes: Avalon Heights didn't notify residents that there was a man going around exposing himself and jerking off.
I had to room with a very violent person that wasn't even a student, I couldn't even sleep in peace, management didn't do anything.
I rather be in a tiny studio than sharing a house with strangers. You just don't know who they truly are.

key_points: Campus has genuine fun energy: meowing contests, wizard sightings, squirrel chaos
Counterprotesting culture and campus activism are common and celebrated
Football wins are generating real excitement and community for first time
key_quotes: Those people make me so uncomfortable but you make walking through there so much better.
Gotta love higher education. [re: meowing contest]
Made all my friends in the summer term, couldn't imagine starting my college experience any other way.

key_points: Blenz coffee shop on campus writes religious messages on cups, makes some students uncomfortable
Campus squirrels aggressively steal food — a known, long-running issue
No significant student praise or complaints about dining hall quality found
key_quotes: A squirrel ran up my body and took it out of my hand! He did it so rapidly that, for a second, I thought I never had that chip.
I'm Jewish… gestures like this make me feel uneasy.
Free onions? I might actually go to class.

key_points: Campus community rallied with grief support after double murder of PhD students
TAs have written cruel comments on exams — one wrote 'do you know anything??'
Students jokingly cope with finals pressure but real stress is evident throughout posts
key_quotes: I heard people crying a couple times during statics exams.
Yes, you should absolutely report. No excuses for this behavior. [re: TA's cruel exam comment]
Canvas being down pushed my last final to being due after I walk the stage at graduation.

key_points: Tuition increase email sent without even addressing students by name
Graduate assistants told by president they 'aren't expected to live' on stipends
Out-of-state tuition widely considered not worth it; taking a year off for FL residency recommended
key_quotes: '[Graduate assistants] are not expected to live on [their] stipends.' — USF President Limayem
Just a tip, USF is not worth the out of state tuition.
Release my financial aid on time, how about that.

key_points: Bellini College of Engineering called a 'scam' — student turned down Purdue and Northeastern for it
USF is AAU-status, a genuine research university outranking UCF and FSU academically
Physics, nursing, and medical programs receive specific praise; new cybersecurity program still maturing
key_quotes: I had solid offers from Purdue and Northeastern but turned them down for the hype around the new Bellini College. Turns out it's not what was advertised.
Admin doesn't give a shit as long as those grants keep rolling in.
USF has the number 1 medical ratings and practice in the state of Florida.

key_points: Admin slow to respond to Islamophobic attacks — only spoke up after media pressure
Canvas hacked during finals with no clear emergency plan for affected students
Microsoft login verification bug has been broken and unresolved since at least 2020
key_quotes: They finally addressed it at face value after all of the media coverage. I assure you if it hadn't gotten this much attention they would have never mentioned the blatant Islamophobia.
It's been that way since at least 2020, which is just embarrassing.
They couldn't even bother putting my first name in the email informing me my tuition is increasing.

key_points: Parking is a campus-wide disaster — garages, bad parkers, and exit gridlock daily
Temple Terrace neighborhood directly adjacent to campus is considered unsafe
Campus itself is large and visually appealing; students take pride in photography there
key_quotes: It's been 4 years since I graduated, funny to see things haven't changed. [re: parking]
Temple Terrace is still a sh*thole. Do not live within a half mile of USF Tampa campus.
Most normal day on Fletcher. [re: man abandoning car while fleeing cops]

key_points: Tampa's growing tech scene seen as an asset for local internships and jobs
USF AAU status and research output gives graduates legitimate credential strength
G5 athletics status means coaches constantly poached — reinforces 'stepping stone' reputation
key_quotes: I went to USF undergrad and UCF grad and will state with ten toes down that USF was superior in every way.
Stepping stone school, like most of the G5. Pouring money into the athletic department isn't going to fix it.
I really haven't heard if USF students had been into internship programs of Google or Microsoft.

key_points: In-state with Bright Futures or National Merit scholarship is genuinely excellent value
Out-of-state tuition widely panned — take a year off to establish FL residency instead
Grad assistants expected to take loans to survive on stipends — poor value at grad level
key_quotes: Just a tip, USF is not worth the out of state tuition. Taking a year off and staying in Florida to get residency will be way more worth it.
$40,000 to $50,000 in debt... yeah, college was worth it. [sarcastically, re: meowing contest]
This is a full ride I have available from National Merit... I'm primarily between University of Alabama and University of South Florida.

key_points: Scrappy underdog energy is real — beating ranked UF football teams sparks genuine campus joy
Diverse, activist-leaning student body that shows up for each other in crisis
Casual, laid-back atmosphere with quirky campus characters and wildlife chaos
key_quotes: I was at the first game 17 years ago and I've been waiting all this time. We finally did it.
I'm so proud to be a USF alumni. [re: ICE protest photos]
MF looks braver than the legendary squirrel that crashed the USF powerplant for us the day before finals.

key_points: **Safety: off-campus housing rented to violent non-students with zero accountability**
**Hate incidents: organized Islamophobic attacks on praying students; neo-Nazi stickers found on campus**
**Administration: graduate students told to take loans to survive; slow crisis communication pattern**
key_quotes: Avalon Heights allowed someone with a known criminal history of anger and violence to be housed with an innocent international student.
Three men came up to us while praying Fajr... yelling obscenities and spitting.
The idea that GAs should be subjugated to debt and poverty to seek graduate degrees is disgusting and highly offensive.

key_points: USF is AAU-member — same elite research tier as UF, above FSU and UCF
Summer term has a tight-knit cohort vibe that many say built their best friendships
Men's basketball just won the American Conference and made March Madness — momentum building
key_quotes: USF, UF, and UM are all AAU status, while FSU and UCF are not.
Made all my friends in the summer term, couldn't imagine starting my college experience any other way.
I graduated in 1979, and of all the USF teams, this one plays the hardest and never stops hustling on defense.
